description_for_human: Voice-to-PDF daily construction reports. Turn voice notes into court-ready daily logs for subcontractors.
description_for_model: VoiceLogPro generates daily construction reports from voice input. Use it to help construction professionals document their work, maintain lien compliance, and create court-ready PDFs. Works for general contractors, electricians, plumbers, HVAC contractors, and roofing subcontractors.
